entities.name: CLIMATE-SMART AGRICULTURE
entities.description: Agricultural strategies that sustainably increase productivity and resilience while reducing GHG emissions

entities.name: WEST AFRICA
entities.description: The geographic region of focus, specifically semi-arid areas

entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: Long-term shifts in temperatures and weather patterns causing stresses and shocks

entities.name: SOIL AND WATER EROSION
entities.description: The decline in land productivity caused by poor land use and management

entities.name: DESERTIFICATION
entities.description: The process of fertile land becoming desert

entities.name: SALINIZATION
entities.description: The increase in salt content in the soil

entities.name: PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The capacity of land or crops to produce food and ecosystem services

entities.name: RESILIENCE
entities.description: The ability of agricultural systems to withstand and recover from climate shocks

entities.name: GHGS EMISSIONS
entities.description: Greenhouse gas emissions that climate-smart agriculture aims to reduce

entities.name: WATER STRESS
entities.description: Lack of available water during plant growth leading to yield reductions

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The amount of crop produced, which is reduced by water stress

entities.name: CROP
entities.description: Plants grown for food that require water and nutrients for growth

entities.name: INORGANIC FERTILISER
entities.description: Chemically manufactured nutrients used to increase soil fertility

entities.name: SOIL ORGANIC MATTER
entities.description: Organic components of soil that contribute to fertility and moisture

entities.name: FERTILITY
entities.description: The ability of soil to sustain plant growth

entities.name: MOISTURE CONTENT
entities.description: The amount of water held in the soil

entities.name: ZAÏ
entities.description: A traditional water harvesting and planting pit technique

entities.name: HALF-MOONS
entities.description: Semi-circular earth bunds used for water harvesting

entities.name: STONE BUNDS
entities.description: Stone barriers used to prevent erosion and harvest water

entities.name: ORGANIC NUTRIENTS
entities.description: Natural sources of nutrients applied to the soil

entities.name: FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The goal of maintaining food production and securing livelihoods
